analysis_result: NES for WNT_UP.V1_UP in MPNST-G2 top pathways = 1.6680026
denominator_used: N/A (single value lookup from Fig 3c source data; MPNST-G2 top 10 pathways block contains 10 pathway NES values)
assumptions_made: Fig 3c sheet contains two blocks: 'Top 10 Pathways Overexpressed in MPNST-G1' (rows 1-11) and 'Top 10 Pathways Overexpressed in MPNST-G2' (rows 18-31); WNT_UP.V1_UP appears only in the MPNST-G2 block as the 10th (lowest-ranked) pathway; NES values are reported to 7 decimal places in the source data
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - File: /data/41467_2023_38432_MOESM10_ESM.xlsx
   - Sheet: 'Fig 3c'

B. COHORT / SCOPE

   - Header: 'Top 10 Pathways Overexpressed in MPNST-G2' (row 18)
   - Column headers: 'Pathways', 'Normalized Enrichment Score' (row 20)

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Pathway name column (A): string identifier matching MSigDB C6 oncogenic signature names
   - NES column (B): Normalized Enrichment Score from GSEA (float)

D. COMPUTATION
   - Direct lookup: locate row where column A == 'WNT_UP.V1_UP' within the MPNST-G2 block
   - Read column B value

E. RESULT
   - NES for WNT_UP.V1_UP (MPNST-G2 top pathways) = 1.6680026
   - This is the 10th pathway listed in the MPNST-G2 block (ranked lowest NES of the 10)

F. CAVEATS
